services.auth: WHMCS session cookie (browser:true). Logged-in probe: page text contains "退出账户".
services.response: SSR HTML. Rows under #tableServicesList tbody tr; service id from a[href*=productdetails] (?id=N); tds = [statusIcon, product, price+cycle, nextDue, status, action].
services.notes: No JSON API for the client area; extract from the rendered table.

detail.response: SSR HTML. Body text carries 已用流量/剩余流量/N日后流量重置/下次付款; '流量已用尽' banner when exhausted. The 获取订阅链接 button onclick holds Subscription/index?sid=<id>&token=<14hex>.
detail.notes: sid == serviceId. token (14 hex) is the per-account subscription token — DO NOT persist it.

subscription_index.auth: token in query (from the detail page).
subscription_index.response: HTML page of per-client buttons (input[type=button]). Each button onclick=GetSubscription('/Subscription/<Client>?...','<id>'). Surge buttons use SurgeCopy(url,url_u) which opens a 托管/非托管 modal.
subscription_index.notes: CRITICAL: the raw onclick path (e.g. /Subscription/Clash?t=anytls_clash&...) returns HTTP 503 '系统内部异常' on its own. Only the server-minted WRAPPED url works: clicking the button fires a jQuery POST (delaytime≈8s server-side), then the address shows in a layui popup as '订阅地址：https://161.129.35.81/?<base64>'. That wrapped /?<base64> form is the persistent, reusable subscription URL (verified working for Clash Verge auto-update via self_proxy). Adapter drives the button + polls the popup.
